play.title: PLAY
play.subtitle: Choose your mode
play.playAiDesc: Battle against AI opponents of varying difficulty
play.playOnlineDesc: Play against other players in real-time

game.startingHandDesc: Keep this hand or mulligan for a new one? (One chance only)
game.tipMulligan: Choose to keep or redraw your starting hand
game.tipReady: Pick a die from your Fixer to roll and add to your Gigs
game.tipPlaySell: Sell a card to get Eddies, then play cards from your hand
game.tipPlayCards: Click cards in your hand to play them, or End Play to attack
game.tipAttack: Select a unit, then click a spent rival unit to Fight or click your unit again to Steal Gigs directly
game.tipDefending: You are being attacked! Respond with a Blocker, Call a Legend, or Accept.
game.loseOvertime: Overtime loss. Opponent had more Gigs.
game.easyDesc: Random actions. Great for learning the game.
game.mediumDesc: Greedy strategy. Plays strong cards when possible.

effect.chooseUnitGearBoost: Choose a unit with Gear to boost (+2 per Gear, defeated at end of turn)
effect.chooseRivalGigAdjust: Choose a rival Gig to adjust

effect.spendGoroDefense: Spend to give a friendly unit (cost 4 or less) +1 power and BLOCKER for this attack?
effect.chooseRivalGigSteal: Choose a rival Gig Die to steal ({current}/{total})

auth.resetSent: If an account exists with that email, a reset link has been sent.

rules.title: RULES
rules.subtitle: Learn the Cyberpunk TCG
rules.goalDesc: Start your turn with 6 or more Gig Dice in your Gig Area and you win the game. Each die counts as one Gig regardless of its face value.
rules.goalOvertime: If both players have taken all dice from their Fixer, the game enters Overtime. The moment a player has strictly more Gigs than the opponent, they win.
rules.goalDeckout: If your Deck runs out of cards, your rival automatically wins.
rules.setupLegends: Place your 3 Legends face-down in the Legends Area in random order. You don't peek at them.
rules.setupDeck: Shuffle your remaining 40-50 cards into your Deck.
rules.setupDice: Place all 6 Gig Dice (d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d20) in your Fixer Area.
rules.setupFirst: The first player spends 2 of their Legends as penalty. Both players draw 6 cards.
rules.setupMulligan: Each player may Mulligan once: shuffle your hand back into the Deck and draw 6 new cards.
rules.readyWin: Check win condition: if you have 6+ Gigs, you win immediately.
rules.readyGig: Choose a Gig Die from your Fixer Area (d20 must be taken last). Roll it and place it in your Gig Area with the rolled value.
rules.readyReady: Ready all your spent cards (turn them back upright).
rules.playDesc: Do any of the following in any order:
rules.playSell: Sell a card: Once per turn, place a card with the sell tag face-down in your Eddies Area. It becomes currency.
rules.playCall: Call a Legend: Once per turn, spend 2 Eddies to flip a face-down Legend. Its FLIP/CALL effect triggers immediately.
rules.playUnit: Play a Unit: Pay its cost in Eddies. Place it on your Field. It cannot attack this turn.
rules.playGear: Play Gear: Pay its cost, attach it to a friendly Unit. Adds power and possibly effects.
rules.playProgram: Play a Program: Pay its cost. Its effect resolves immediately, then it goes to Trash.
rules.playGoSolo: Go Solo: Pay a face-up Legend's cost to send it to the Field as a ready Unit. It CAN attack this turn.
rules.playEnd: When done, end the Play Phase to move to Attack.
rules.attackDesc: Each of your ready Units can attack one at a time.
rules.attackFight: Attack a spent rival Unit = FIGHT. Compare power. Higher power wins. Equal = both defeated. Defeated units and their Gear go to Trash.
rules.attackSteal: Attack the rival directly = STEAL. Take one of their Gig Dice. For every 10 power, steal 1 extra Gig.
rules.attackBlocker: BLOCKER: The defender may spend a Unit with the Blocker keyword to redirect an attack to it. If a Blocker intercepts a direct attack, no Gig is stolen even if the attacker wins.
rules.attackCallDef: The defender can also Call a Legend during this step (once per turn, costs 2 Eddies).
rules.attackCantAttack: Units cannot attack the turn they are played. Only spent rival Units can be targeted for a Fight.
rules.attackEnd: When done attacking, end your turn. Opponent's Ready Phase begins.
rules.cardsLegend: Legend: Your 3 leaders. Start face-down. Can be Called (flipped) for 2 Eddies. Can be spent as 1 Eddie each. Some have Go Solo to enter the Field.
rules.cardsUnit: Unit: Crew members placed on the Field. They attack and fight. Cannot attack the turn played.
rules.cardsGear: Gear: Equipment attached to Units. Adds power and abilities. When a Unit is defeated, its Gear goes with it to Trash.
rules.cardsProgram: Program: Instant effects. Played, effect resolves, then discarded to Trash.
rules.eddiesDesc: Eddies are the currency of the game. You create them by selling cards from your hand.
rules.eddiesSell: Cards with the sell tag can be sold once per turn. The card goes face-down to your Eddies Area.
rules.eddiesSpend: To play a card, spend Eddies equal to its cost. You can also spend Legends (face-up or face-down) as 1 Eddie each.
rules.eddiesReady: Spent Eddies and Legends ready at the start of your turn and can be spent again.
rules.ramLegends: Your deck must have exactly 3 Legend cards with unique names.
rules.ramCards: 40 to 50 cards in your main deck (not counting Legends). Maximum 3 copies of the same card.
rules.ramDesc: Each Legend has a RAM value and a color. The total RAM from Legends of the same color determines the maximum RAM for cards of that color in your deck.
rules.ramExample: Example: If you have 2 Green Legends with RAM 2 each, your deck can include Green cards up to 4 RAM total.
rules.scDesc: Street Cred is the sum of all your Gig Dice face values. Many card effects check your Street Cred as a condition.
rules.scExample: Example: Armored Minotaur's effect only activates if you have 12+ Street Cred.
rules.scGrow: Street Cred grows as you gain Gigs and shrinks when Gigs are stolen.
rules.kwBlocker: BLOCKER: When a rival Unit attacks, you may spend this Unit to redirect the attack to it.
rules.kwGoSolo: GO SOLO: Pay the Legend's cost to play it as a ready Unit that can attack this turn.
rules.kwPlay: PLAY trigger: Effect activates when the card is played (cost paid).
rules.kwAttack: ATTACK trigger: Effect activates when the Unit attacks, before the fight resolves.
rules.kwFlip: FLIP/CALL trigger: Effect activates when a Legend is Called (flipped face-up).
rules.kwPassive: PASSIVE: Effect is always active while the card is in play.
rules.diceDesc: Each player has 6 dice of different sizes. One is taken from the Fixer each turn, rolled, and placed in the Gig Area.
rules.diceWin: You need 6 Gigs (dice) to win, not a specific total value. Two low dice are better than one high die for winning.
